meaning: 1. to take a picture of a person without permission or without their k
sentence: 在更衣室偷拍是违法的。
pinyin: Zài gēngyīshì tōupāi shì wéifǎ de.
english: Taking secret photos in a changing room is illegal.

meaning: 1. to hit the target with one's throw; 2. (basketball) to score
sentence: 他在最后一秒投中了三分球。
pinyin: Tā zài zuìhòu yī miǎo tóuzhòng le sānfēnqiú.
english: He scored a three-pointer in the last second.

sentence: 这部电影的叙事方式很独特。
pinyin: Zhè bù diànyǐng de xùshì fāngshì hěn dútè.
english: This film's narrative style is very unique.

sentence: 医生每年给他做例行检查。
pinyin: Yīshēng měi nián gěi tā zuò lìxíng jiǎnchá.
english: The doctor gives him a routine check-up every year.

sentence: 她每晚看一小时电视节目。
pinyin: Tā měi wǎn kàn yī xiǎoshí diànshì jiémù.
english: She watches TV programs for one hour every evening.

sentence: 他把微信头像换成了宝宝的照片。
pinyin: Tā bǎ Wēixìn tóuxiàng huànchéng le bǎobao de zhàopiàn.
english: He changed his WeChat profile picture to a photo of his baby.

sentence: 她的成绩一直在班里前列。
pinyin: Tā de chéngjì yīzhí zài bān lǐ qiánliè.
english: Her grades have always been among the top in the class.

sentence: 请画一条五厘米长的线段。
pinyin: Qǐng huà yī tiáo wǔ límǐ cháng de xiànduàn.
english: Please draw a line segment five centimeters long.

sentence: 访问者问了她很多私人问题。
pinyin: Fǎngwènzhě wènle tā hěn duō sīrén wèntí.
english: The interviewer asked her many personal questions.

meaning: 1. fingerprint; 2. the arches, loops and whorls on the fingers
sentence: 手机可以用指纹解锁。
pinyin: Shǒujī kěyǐ yòng zhǐwén jiěsuǒ.
english: The phone can be unlocked with a fingerprint.

sentence: 村民每年都祭拜水神求风调雨顺。
pinyin: Cūnmín měi nián dōu jìbài shuǐshén qiú fēngtiáoyǔshùn.
english: Villagers pray to the river god every year for good weather.

meaning: 1. clauses and sub-clauses (in formal document); 2. entry (in a dictio
sentence: 这本词典每天会新增几个条目。
pinyin: Zhè běn cídiǎn měi tiān huì xīnzēng jǐ gè tiáomù.
english: This dictionary adds several new entries every day.

meaning: 1. rendering (computing); 2. to add washes of ink or color to a drawin
sentence: 这张图渲染完需要两个小时。
pinyin: Zhè zhāng tú xuànrǎn wán xūyào liǎng gè xiǎoshí.
english: Rendering this image takes two hours.

sentence: 他大学时选修了程序设计课。
pinyin: Tā dàxué shí xuǎnxiū le chéngxù shèjì kè.
english: He took a computer programming course in university.

meaning: 1. a building used as a factory; 2. factory (building); 3. CL:座[zuò],棟
sentence: 旧厂房已经改建成了创意园区。
pinyin: Jiù chǎngfáng yǐjīng gǎijiàn chéng le chuàngyì yuánqū.
english: The old factory building has been converted into a creative park.

sentence: 在很多国家卖淫是违法的。
pinyin: Zài hěn duō guójiā màiyín shì wéifǎ de.
english: Prostitution is illegal in many countries.

sentence: 政府出台新政策支持中小企业发展。
pinyin: Zhèng fǔ chū tái xīn zhèng cè zhī chí zhōng xiǎo qǐ yè fā zhǎn.
english: The government introduced new policies to support the development of small and medium enterprises.

sentence: 那位高僧被皇帝封为国师。
pinyin: Nà wèi gāo sēng bèi huáng dì fēng wéi guó shī.
english: That eminent monk was appointed as the emperor's national teacher.

meaning: three-year college; junior college; professional training college
sentence: 她读的是大专，毕业后直接工作了。
pinyin: Tā dú de shì dà zhuān, bì yè hòu zhí jiē gōng zuò le.
english: She attended a junior college and went straight to work after graduating.

sentence: 他是著名的翻译家，翻了几十本书。
pinyin: Tā shì zhù míng de fān yì jiā, fān le jǐ shí běn shū.
english: He is a well-known translator who has translated dozens of books.

meaning: to cut staff; to lay off employees
sentence: 公司因为效益不好开始裁员了。
pinyin: Gōng sī yīn wèi xiào yì bù hǎo kāi shǐ cái yuán le.
english: The company started laying off staff due to poor performance.

meaning: state-owned enterprise; (Tw) international business management (as a s
sentence: 他在国企工作，福利待遇很好。
pinyin: Tā zài guó qǐ gōng zuò, fú lì dài yù hěn hǎo.
english: He works at a state-owned enterprise, which offers great benefits.

meaning: to play fast and loose with the law; to game the system; (leisure) rul
sentence: 这款游戏玩法很新颖，我很喜欢。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn yóu xì wán fǎ hěn xīn yǐng, wǒ hěn xǐ huān.
english: This game has very innovative gameplay; I really like it.

sentence: 古代读书人通过科举进入仕途。
pinyin: Gǔ dài dú shū rén tōng guò kē jǔ jìn rù shì tú.
english: In ancient times, scholars entered officialdom through the imperial examination.

meaning: evolution of sth over time; course of development; history
sentence: 这本书介绍了这座城市的历史沿革。
pinyin: Zhè běn shū jiè shào le zhè zuò chéng shì de lì shǐ yán gé.
english: This book traces the historical evolution of this city.

sentence: 医生建议他去检查一下精液质量。
pinyin: Yī shēng jiàn yì tā qù jiǎn chá yī xià jīng yè zhì liàng.
english: The doctor suggested he get his semen quality checked.

meaning: year after year; on an annual basis
sentence: 公司的销售额逐年增加。
pinyin: Gōng sī de xiāo shòu é zhú nián zēng jiā.
english: The company's sales revenue has grown year after year.

sentence: 昆明的四季如春，气候非常宜人。
pinyin: Kūnmíng de sìjì rú chūn, qìhòu fēicháng yírén.
english: Kunming has spring-like weather all four seasons — the climate is very pleasant.

sentence: 老人的晚年生活过得很幸福。
pinyin: Lǎorén de wǎnnián shēnghuó guò de hěn xìngfú.
english: The elderly person's later years are very happy.

meaning: 1. to dispatch (vehicles, staff etc); 2. to schedule; 3. to manage; 4.
sentence: 车站的调度员负责安排列车时刻表。
pinyin: Chēzhàn de diào dù yuán fùzé ānpái lièchē shíkèbiǎo.
english: The station dispatcher is responsible for arranging the train schedule.

sentence: 他们公司是一家中型企业。
pinyin: Tāmen gōngsī shì yī jiā zhōng xíng qǐyè.
english: Their company is a medium-sized enterprise.

meaning: 1. to clamber up; 2. (of prices etc) to rise
sentence: 近来房价持续攀升。
pinyin: Jìnlái fángjià chíxù pānshēng.
english: Housing prices have been continuously rising lately.

sentence: 他们俩平分家务，从不吵架。
pinyin: Tāmen liǎ píngfēn jiāwù, cóng bù chǎojià.
english: The two of them split the housework evenly and never argue.

sentence: 他骑摩托上下班，省时又省钱。
pinyin: Tā qí mótuō shàngxiàbān, shěng shí yòu shěng qián.
english: He rides a motorbike to work, saving time and money.

sentence: 政府加强了对食品安全的管控。
pinyin: Zhèngfǔ jiāqiángle duì shípǐn ānquán de guǎnkòng.
english: The government has tightened its control over food safety.

sentence: 他服刑三年后终于获释了。
pinyin: Tā fúxíng sān nián hòu zhōngyú huòshì le.
english: He was finally freed after serving three years in prison.

sentence: 他爬上树后发现自己下不来了。
pinyin: Tā pá shàng shù hòu fāxiàn zìjǐ xià bu lái le.
english: After climbing the tree, he found he couldn't get back down.

meaning: 1. to choose arbitrarily; 2. to take whichever one fancies
sentence: 套餐包含三道菜，可任选口味。
pinyin: Tàocān bāohán sān dào cài, kě rènxuǎn kǒuwèi.
english: The set meal includes three dishes; you can freely choose the flavors.

sentence: 新政策让这座城市走向中兴。
pinyin: Xīn zhèngcè ràng zhè zuò chéngshì zǒuxiàng zhōngxīng.
english: The new policy has set the city on a path to resurgence.

sentence: 他一点半分都不肯让步。
pinyin: Tā yīdiǎn bàn fēn dōu bù kěn ràngbù.
english: He is not willing to give even a little bit of ground.

sentence: 医生用X射线检查了他的手腕。
pinyin: Yīshēng yòng X shèxiàn jiǎnchá le tā de shǒuwàn.
english: The doctor examined his wrist with an X-ray.

meaning: 1. to be saved from; 2. to be spared (something)
sentence: 接种疫苗可以免于感染这种病毒。
pinyin: Jiēzhòng yìmiáo kěyǐ miǎnyú gǎnrǎn zhè zhǒng bìngdú.
english: Getting vaccinated can spare you from infection by this virus.

sentence: 店门上用金字写着店名。
pinyin: Diàn mén shàng yòng jīnzì xiězhe diànmíng.
english: The shop's name is written in gold lettering above the entrance.

sentence: 这套房子已经有买家了。
pinyin: Zhè tào fángzi yǐjīng yǒu mǎijiā le.
english: This apartment already has a buyer.

meaning: 1. to migrate; 2. to move to a new place of residence
sentence: 她三十岁时移居到了加拿大。
pinyin: Tā sānshí suì shí yíjū dào le Jiānádà.
english: She moved to Canada when she was thirty.

sentence: 部队在山区建立了新的驻地。
pinyin: Bùduì zài shānqū jiànlì le xīn de zhùdì.
english: The troops set up a new station in the mountain area.

meaning: 1. to go on a hunger strike
sentence: 他通过绝食抗议来引起社会关注。
pinyin: Tā tōngguò juéshí kàngyì lái yǐnqǐ shèhuì guānzhù.
english: He went on a hunger strike to draw public attention.

sentence: 这首单曲发布后立刻登上了排行榜。
pinyin: Zhè shǒu dānqǔ fābù hòu lìkè dēngshàng le páihángbǎng.
english: This single immediately topped the charts after its release.

sentence: 零是不是自然数，各国的规定不同。
pinyin: Líng shì bu shì zìrán shù, gè guó de guīdìng bùtóng.
english: Whether zero is a natural number differs by country's definition.

sentence: 他减少了所有非必要的开支。
pinyin: Tā jiǎnshǎo le suǒyǒu fēibìyào de kāizhī.
english: He cut back on all unnecessary expenses.
